response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX/embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse language experience
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems across platforms
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX environments
No demonstrated knowledge of embedded networking security protocols
Japanese language proficiency is absent — a mandatory requirement

key_factors.factor: No Linux Kernel or Network Security Exposure
